What we work on together

Everything you need to actually succeed

Coaching covers every angle — from the practical skills to the mindset shifts that make results stick.

Reading Nutrition Labels

Stop guessing what's in your food. Learn to decode any label with confidence.

Serving Size Education

One of the most overlooked skills — and one of the most powerful for fat loss.

Meal Planning

Build a realistic, enjoyable eating rhythm that works with your schedule — not against it.

Performance Fueling

Whether you lift, run, or train — learn to eat in a way that supports your output.

Body Composition & Muscle

Understand how to lose fat and build or preserve muscle at the same time.

Plateau Troubleshooting

Stuck? We'll figure out why and build a smarter strategy to break through.

Relationship with Food

Work through guilt, restriction cycles, and all-or-nothing thinking for good.

Listen to Your Body

Learn your hunger and satiety cues — and how to trust them again.

Longevity & Clean Eating

Fueling for energy, health, and a long life — not just a number on the scale.

Whether you're 25 or 55, I've worked with people just like you.

A competitive weightlifter. A night-shift nurse. A mom of three. A 51-year-old starting over. The plan changes — the process doesn't. Let's build yours.

How it works

Your path to lasting change

Every coaching relationship starts in the same place: understanding where you are right now. From there, we build together.

1

Discovery Call

Free 30-minute conversation to understand your goals, history, and what's held you back.

2

Personalized Strategy

I build your nutrition targets, education plan, and habit roadmap around your real life.

3

Learn & Implement

We work together week by week — tracking, adjusting, and building your knowledge.

4

Accountability & Results

Consistent check-ins, honest conversations, and celebrating every win along the way.

I don't want you to need me forever. I want to teach you enough that you can do this on your own — and choose to keep working with me because it's working, not because you're lost without me.

— JESS, FUEL WITH JESS

Meet your coach

Hi, I'm Jess

NASM Certified Nutrition Coach, competitive weightlifter, and real food lover. I'm here to teach you how food actually works — and make it feel less complicated than everyone else has made it.

NASM Certified Nutrition Coach
Macro coaching · Performance fueling · Lifestyle nutrition

My story

For years I chased results the wrong way — cutting entire food groups, following meal plans I couldn't maintain, and letting the scale dictate my mood. Nothing stuck, and I was exhausted.

Everything shifted when I started competing in weightlifting. Performance demanded that I actually fuel my body — not starve it. I learned to track macros, read labels, and build a relationship with food rooted in curiosity instead of fear. The weight came off. The energy came back. And I finally felt like myself.

That transformation is what drove me to become a NASM Certified Nutrition Coach. I know what it feels like to start late, feel lost, and not know who to trust. And I know what it feels like on the other side — empowered, confident, and free.

What I believe

Behavior change is hard. Mindset matters as much as macros. And no diet works long-term if it doesn't fit your life. I coach from that place — meeting you exactly where you are, with zero judgment and a whole lot of practical education.

Whether your goal is fat loss, building muscle, improving your relationship with food, or just figuring out what the heck is on a nutrition label — I've got you.

Education First

You should understand why every recommendation I make is right for you — not just follow it blindly.

No Foods Off-Limits

Clean eating is a spectrum, not a prison. Balance, flexibility, and joy all belong in a healthy diet.

Honest Accountability

I'm in your corner — which means I'll celebrate your wins and have real conversations when things go sideways.

Longevity Over Quick Fixes

We're building habits for the next 30 years, not just the next 30 days.

Coaching packages

Find the right fit for you

Four tiers, one mission: teach you to eat in a way you can sustain for life. Whether you want the basics or full white-glove support, every package starts with a real intake conversation — not a generic template.

Tier 1

Starter

You've never tracked before — or you tried and it felt overwhelming. Let's start simple and build from there.

  • Intake + goal-setting session
  • Personalized macro targets
  • Nutrition label education guide
  • Serving size education
  • 1 monthly check-in
  • Email support
Book a Discovery Call
Tier 2

Core

You know the basics but can't make them stick. Bi-weekly check-ins and real meal strategy to bridge the gap.

  • Everything in Starter
  • Meal planning guidance
  • Grocery & pantry walkthrough
  • Habit & behavior coaching
  • Bi-weekly check-ins
  • WhatsApp / text support
Book a Discovery Call
Most Popular

Premium

Weekly sessions, custom plans, and the kind of support that actually moves the needle. Most popular for a reason.

  • Everything in Core
  • Weekly 1:1 coaching sessions
  • Body composition strategy
  • Performance & training fueling
  • Mindset + relationship with food
  • Priority messaging support
Book a Discovery Call
Tier 4

VIP

Every decision runs through me. Unlimited access, supplement and lab review, and a monthly deep-dive strategy call.

  • Everything in Premium
  • Unlimited messaging access
  • Progress & body image coaching
  • Supplement & lifestyle review
  • Monthly strategy deep-dive
  • Long-term longevity planning
Book a Discovery Call

Client love

Real people,
real results

Every journey looks different. But the common thread is learning to work with food — and with themselves — instead of against it.

"I came in thinking I needed to overhaul my entire diet. Jess showed me I just needed to understand what I was already eating. Three months in, nothing is off-limits and I'm down 14 lbs. I actually look forward to checking in with her."

San Diego, CA · Premium package · 3 months

"I was a Division I athlete who never actually understood nutrition. Jess fixed that in six weeks."

Core package · competitive lifter

"She worked around my night-shift schedule, my picky eating, and my travel. If she can make it work for me, she can make it work for anyone."

Danielle T.

Premium package · ICU nurse

"I started coaching at 51 thinking it was too late. Lost 12 lbs and finally understand why nothing worked before."

Linda K.

VIP package · ongoing

"The label reading module alone was worth the investment. I didn't realize how lost I was in the grocery store until Jess fixed it."

Katie R.

Starter package · 2 months

Legal

Policies & Terms

Everything you need to know about how Fuel with Jess operates, protects your information, and what to expect when you work with me.

Effective Date: May 13, 2026  ·  Last Updated: May 13, 2026

Please read these Terms & Conditions carefully before using the Fuel with Jess website or engaging our coaching services. By accessing or purchasing services, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site or services.

1. About Us

Fuel with Jess is a health coaching business operated by Jessica Pierce in California. We provide nutrition education, macro coaching, meal planning guidance, and lifestyle support. Coach is certified and is not a licensed physician, registered dietitian (RDN), or other licensed healthcare provider.

2. Acceptance of Terms

By using this site or engaging our services, you confirm that you are at least 18 years of age, legally capable of entering into agreements, and have read and understood these Terms.

3. Services

Services are offered as described on this website and in your Coaching Services Agreement. Fuel with Jess reserves the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any service at any time with reasonable notice.

4. Not Medical Advice

All information provided through this site and through coaching services is for general educational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. It is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider before making significant dietary changes, especially if you are pregnant, nursing, or have a pre-existing medical condition.

5. User Responsibilities

  • Provide complete and accurate information about your health and goals
  • Notify Coach promptly of any changes to your health status
  • Use all content and resources for personal, non-commercial purposes only
  • Do not share, distribute, or reproduce proprietary materials without prior written consent

6. Intellectual Property

All content on this site including text, graphics, logos, guides, and trademarks is the property of Fuel with Jess Health Coaching, LLC. You may not create derivative works or use any content commercially without prior written consent.

7. Testimonials & Results Disclaimer

Client stories and testimonials reflect individual experiences and are not a guarantee of results. Outcomes vary based on effort, adherence, body composition, and other individual factors.

8. Third-Party Links

This site may contain links to third-party sites (e.g., Amazon affiliate links, booking tools) for convenience. These links do not imply endorsement. Fuel with Jess is not responsible for third-party content or privacy practices.

9. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Fuel with Jess shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages. Total liability shall not exceed the total amount paid by the client in the three months preceding the claim.

10. Governing Law & Dispute Resolution

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of California. Disputes will first be attempted to be resolved through good-faith negotiation. If unresolved, disputes will be submitted to binding arbitration in the applicable California county.

11. Contact

For questions about these Terms, email: fuelwithjess@gmail.com

Effective Date: May 13, 2026  ·  Last Updated: May 13, 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how Fuel with Jess Health Coaching, LLC ("we," "us," or "our"), operated by Jessica Pierce, collects, uses, stores, and protects personal information provided by visitors to our website and clients who engage in coaching services. By using our services, you agree to the terms of this Policy.

1. Information We Collect

Information You Provide Directly:

  • Contact info: name, email address, phone number
  • Health & wellness info: age, height, weight, medical conditions, dietary restrictions, food preferences
  • Lifestyle info: sleep habits, activity levels, exercise routine, occupation, alcohol/tobacco use, prior macro tracking experience
  • Payment info: processed through third-party payment processors; we do not store credit card data directly
  • Communications: messages, session notes, and exchanges between coach and client

Information Collected Automatically: Page visit data, time spent on site, browser type, general location, and cookies or similar tracking technologies.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To deliver and improve coaching services
  • To send program updates and session reminders
  • To create personalized meal plans and macro targets
  • To comply with legal obligations
  • To send periodic email communications (you may opt out at any time)

We will never sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes without your explicit consent.

3. Sensitive Health Information

We understand that health information is sensitive. All data including body metrics, medical history, and coaching notes is stored securely and accessible only to authorized team members. It is used solely to deliver and improve your coaching experience.

4. Data Sharing

We may share data with service providers who help us operate (e.g., Google Calendar, Formspree, Instagram) only as long as necessary to deliver services. We do not sell personal data. We may disclose information if required by law.

5. Data Retention

Client records are retained for a minimum of three (3) years unless a longer retention period applies. Upon request, records may be deleted subject to certain legal exceptions.

6. Your Rights (California Residents)

Under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), you have the right to:

  • Know what personal data we collect and how it is used
  • Request deletion of your personal data
  • Opt out of any data sale (we do not sell data)
  • Non-discrimination for exercising your privacy rights

To exercise these rights, email fuelwithjess@gmail.com. We will respond within 45 days.

7. Data Security

We take reasonable organizational and technical measures to protect your data from unauthorized access or loss, including password protection and encryption where available. No method of internet transmission is 100% secure, however, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

8. Cookies

We may use cookies and similar technologies to analyze traffic and improve site functionality. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, though some features may not function properly as a result.

9. Children

Our services are intended for individuals 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect data from minors. If you believe a minor has provided us information, please contact us immediately.

10. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

Contact

Questions or concerns: fuelwithjess@gmail.com

Note: A complete Coaching Services Agreement will be sent to you for signature before your first session. The summary below reflects the key terms.

1. Parties

This Agreement is between Jessica S. Pierce ("Coach"), operating as Fuel with Jess Health Coaching, LLC, a California limited liability company, and the client identified by signature.

2. Scope of Services

Services include personalized macro and calorie target setting, meal planning guidance, nutrition label and serving size education, regular check-ins, accountability support, and recommended resources. Services do not constitute medical treatment, therapy, clinical nutrition management, or diagnosis.

3. Fees & Cancellation

All fees are due in advance. Clients may cancel with 30 days' written notice. A full refund minus a $20 administrative fee is issued for cancellations before the program begins. After the program starts, prorated refunds for uncompleted sessions may be issued at Coach's sole discretion.

4. Client Responsibilities

  • Provide accurate health and lifestyle information
  • Notify Coach of any health status changes
  • Continue working with a physician for medical concerns
  • Take responsibility for personal dietary and lifestyle decisions
  • Keep shared information confidential

5. Photo & Testimonial Release

Clients may choose to authorize or decline use of their progress information or testimonials for marketing purposes. This is confirmed in the signed agreement.

6. Limitation of Liability

Coach's liability is limited to fees paid in the three months prior to any claim. Coach is not liable for indirect or consequential damages.

7. Not Medical Advice

Coach is a certified nutrition coach, not a licensed physician or registered dietitian. Clients are encouraged to consult a healthcare provider before making significant dietary changes.

Note: A complete Liability Waiver will be sent to you for signature before your first session. The summary below reflects the key terms.

1. Parties

This Waiver is between Jessica S. Pierce ("Coach"), operating as Fuel with Jess Health Coaching, LLC, and the client identified by signature.

2. Physician Consultation Required

Clients agree to consult their physician before beginning any program, particularly if they have a pre-existing medical condition, are pregnant or nursing, are taking prescription medications, have a history of disordered eating, or have had recent surgery.

3. Assumption of Risk

Nutrition coaching involves voluntary dietary and lifestyle changes that carry inherent risks. Client voluntarily participates and assumes full responsibility for any adverse reactions or outcomes. Results are not guaranteed.

4. Release of Liability

Client releases Coach and affiliated parties from claims arising from physical harm, failure to achieve results, or errors in connection with services.

5. Eating Disorders & Special Populations

Clients with a known or suspected eating disorder must obtain written clearance from a licensed healthcare provider before beginning services. Coach reserves the right to decline or discontinue services outside the scope of nutrition coaching practice.

IMPORTANT: If you are currently being treated for an eating disorder or condition defined under California Business & Professions Code §2700 et seq., Coach is not qualified to provide clinical dietary management and will refer you to appropriate licensed professionals.

6. Indemnification

Client agrees to indemnify and hold harmless Coach from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from client's use of services or breach of this Waiver.

New Client Application

Let's see if we're a
perfect fit.

Take 3–5 minutes to fill this out. Your answers help me understand where you're at so our discovery call is focused and valuable from minute one.

NASM Certified Nutrition Coach  ·  Fuel with Jess
Takes about 3–5 minutes

0 of 5 complete

Question 1

First, tell me a little about yourself.

Name and contact info so I can follow up after reviewing your application.

Question 2

What is your primary goal right now?

Select all that apply — be honest, even if it's more than one.

Question 3

What's your biggest struggle when it comes to nutrition right now?

Don't overthink it — what's the one thing that keeps getting in your way?

Question 4

Do you have a specific timeline or event you're working toward?

Wedding, competition, vacation, doctor's appointment — or just ready to start now.

Question 5

How ready are you to invest time and energy into this right now?

Be real — 1 means life is chaotic and this isn't top priority, 5 means you're all in and ready to go.

1 — Not quite ready5 — 100% committed

Anything else?

Is there anything else you'd like me to know before our call?

Optional — but this is your chance to share anything that feels important.

After reviewing your application, I'll reach out within 48 hours to share a link to book your free discovery call.

New Client Intake Form

Let's build your
personalized plan.

The more detail you share, the better I can prepare for our onboarding call and hit the ground running from minute one.

Your answers are kept strictly confidential
Takes about 10–15 minutes

Get started below

Personal Info

Tell me the basics.

We'll start simple.

Goals & Vision

What are your specific, measurable goals?

Be as specific as possible — numbers, dates, and feelings all count.

What does success feel like 6 months from now?

Paint me a picture — how do you feel, what are you doing, what's different?

Nutrition History

Have you tracked macros or calories before?

No judgment — just want to know where to start.

1 — Not at all5 — Very comfortable

Describe a typical day of eating for you right now.

Walk me through it — breakfast through evening snacks. Don't clean it up, just be honest.

Any foods you won't eat, can't eat, or are allergic to?

Include preferences and restrictions — nothing is off-limits to tell me.

Relationship with Food & Mindset

How would you describe your current relationship with food?

This is a safe space — there's no wrong answer. I want to understand where you're starting from.

What's your biggest mindset challenge around food or your body?

This is one of the most important questions — your answer helps me tailor my coaching approach.

Exercise & Activity

How would you describe your current activity level?

Select all that apply and tell me more below.

Sleep, Stress & Lifestyle

How's your sleep and stress level right now?

Both have a massive impact on nutrition and results — I want the real picture.

1 — Low5 — Very high
Health History & Supplements

Any medical conditions or medications I should know about?

All information is strictly confidential and used only to tailor your coaching safely.

What supplements or vitamins are you currently taking?

Include protein powder, creatine, pre-workout, vitamins, anything relevant.

Agreements & Confirmation

Please confirm the following before submitting.

These protect both of us and ensure we start on the right foot.

Jess will review this before your onboarding call so you can hit the ground running from minute one.

You're all set!

Thank you for taking the time to fill this out so thoroughly. I'll review everything before our call so we can dive straight into building your plan.

What happens next:
Jess will review your intake answers before your onboarding session. Come ready to ask questions and get excited — this is where the real work begins.
